data.title: Yemeni actor Hamza praised for his perspective on "Rural China" in Shanghai by CNS; offers unique insight.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Beijing saw the China News Service (CNS) release a statement promoting a Yemeni actor's take on "Rural China" in Shanghai. This actor, named Hamza, shared his unique perspective after experiencing a contrasting side of Shanghai, China's largest metropolis. The actor's insights were discussed in the press release unveiled in Beijing.
Announcement under French Commercial Code L.233-8-II & AMF General Regulation 223-16.

data.title: Crypto sector wary of Bank of England stablecoin cap exemptions as it may hinder growth in the UK's industry.
data.description: Industry representatives have stated that implementing a cap would pose challenges in enforcement and potentially hinder the growth of the United Kingdom's thriving crypto industry.

data.title: In 2024, U.S. secured $2.13B in UN contracts, more than dues paid to UN, accounting for 1 in 10 contracts globally.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, it was reported that the United States maintained its position as the leading provider to UN agencies in 2024, receiving contracts worth $2.13 billion. This amount surpassed the U.S. dues to the UN and constituted approximately 10% of all UN contracts globally. This demonstrates the consistent and significant role of the U.S. as a key supplier to the United Nations.

data.title: Sen. Cynthia Lummis supports Jack Dorsey's call for a tax exemption on Bitcoin transactions, her bill exempts gains up to $300.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, a Republican from Wyoming, has expressed support for Block Inc. CEO Jack Dorsey's proposal for tax relief on Bitcoin (BTC) transactions. Lummis referenced a bill she previously introduced, known as the 'De Minimis Tax Exemption.' This bill advocates for an exemption on small BTC payments for everyday expenses, such as buying coffee, to prevent triggering capital gains taxes. Lummis highlighted Dorsey's call for this exemption in a tweet, suggesting that her bill already addresses these concerns. The bill aims to exempt gains from small transactions, allowing for up to $300 per transaction and a yearly limit of $5,000 per individual. The legislation has undergone two readings, and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This new figure represents a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The economy has added approximately 250,000 new jobs in the past month alone, indicating a positive trend in the labor market. Furthermore, the stock market has seen a notable increase, with the main indexes rising by 5% in the last week. Overall, these statistics point towards a healthy and growing economy with promising prospects for the future.

data.title: Transcosmos certified for promoting customer harassment prevention in contact centers, prioritizing CX and safe work environment.
data.description: In Kobe, Japan on October 10, 2025, transcosmos proudly revealed their certification as a business elevating business-to-consumer communication and enhancing customer experience. This certification signifies their commitment to ensuring safe and protected work environments while actively combating customer harassment.
